question: 到 2027 年，AI 生成的代码占所有新代码的比例将达到多少？
questionEn: By 2027, what share of all new code will be AI-generated?

question: 哪个 AI 编程工具最终会赢得市场？
questionEn: Which AI coding tool will ultimately win the market?
optionsEn: A tool that doesn't exist yet

question: AI 会让程序员失业吗？
optionsEn: No — it will create more jobs
It will just change how we work

question: 传统编程语言会因为 AI 而消亡吗？
questionEn: Will traditional programming languages die out because of AI?
options: 自然语言会替代部分编程
会出现 AI 专用新语言
optionsEn: Natural language will replace some coding
